response_parsed.opinion: As an experienced carpenter and part-time worker in Naples, I strongly believe that stereotype threat is a significant hindrance to the growth of older workers in STEM fields. This phenomenon, where individuals are held back due to preconceived notions about their age, can have severe consequences for both personal fulfillment and professional development. It is crucial that we address this issue head-on and work towards creating a more inclusive environment for all ages.
